title: Kiyuwn #3594
definition:
Chiun = "an image" or "pillar"

 1) probably a statue of the Assyrian-Babylonian god of the planet
    Saturn and used to symbolise Israelite apostasy
nasbUsage:
Definition: Chiun = "an image" or "pillar"

 1) probably a statue of the Assyrian-Babylonian god of the planet
    Saturn and used to symbolise Israelite apostasy

    NASB:  a heathen god
